reviews.comment:
La verdad si querés ver la decadencia de las YPF anda a cargar la verdad que una vergüenza para el consumidor no tenes para comprar nada; los surtidores viejos y no quiero ni imaginar lo que deben ser los depósitos de combustible todos sucios seguramente

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, if you want to see the decline of YPF, go fill up there. It's a disgrace for the consumer; you can't afford to buy anything. The pumps are old, and I don't even want to imagine what the fuel tanks must be like—surely all filthy.
